mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO abnormality_record
abnormal_code, device_unit_code, source, abnormal_location, abnormal_type, safety_output, reporter, abnormal_description, report_date, status, handler, handler_name, handler_date, creator_username, creator_name, created_at, updated_at,
#{abnormalCode}, #{deviceUnitCode}, #{source}, #{abnormalLocation}, #{abnormalType}, #{safetyOutput}, #{reporter}, #{abnormalDescription}, #{reportDate}, #{status}, #{handler}, #{handlerName}, #{handlerDate}, #{creatorUsername}, #{creatorName}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT id, abnormal_code AS abnormalCode, device_unit_code AS deviceUnitCode, source, abnormal_location AS abnormalLocation, abnormal_type AS abnormalType, safety_output AS safetyOutput, reporter, abnormal_description AS abnormalDescription, report_date AS reportDate, status, handler, handler_name AS handlerName, handler_date AS handlerDate, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM abnormality_record WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_username = #{creatorUsername}
